_instructions: Update due_date fields when you receive a renewal notice. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Leave as YYYY-MM-DD if the date is not yet known — the tracker will skip unknown dates safely.

obligations.name: Section 8 Annual Recertification
obligations.what_to_bring: Income verification, lease agreement, government-issued ID, any changes in household composition
obligations.notes: Contact housing authority at least 60 days before due date. Missing this deadline can result in loss of housing assistance.

obligations.name: SNAP / Food Stamps Recertification
obligations.contact: ASES / Departamento de la Familia Puerto Rico
obligations.what_to_bring: Income verification, ID, proof of address, household information
obligations.notes: Recertification periods vary. Check your SNAP notice or call your caseworker for exact date. Missing this means a gap in food assistance.

obligations.name: Medicare Open Enrollment / Annual Review
obligations.what_to_bring: Medicare card, list of current medications, current plan information
obligations.notes: Open Enrollment runs Oct 15 – Dec 7 every year. Review your plan each October — drug formularies and premiums change annually. Changes take effect January 1.

obligations.name: Vehicle Registration Renewal (Marbete)
obligations.what_to_bring: Inspection certificate (marbete de inspección), insurance proof, ID, payment
obligations.notes: Must have current vehicle inspection before renewing marbete. Cannot drive without valid registration in PR.

obligations.name: Vehicle Insurance Renewal
obligations.notes: Required for marbete renewal. Keep coverage continuous — lapse means unregisterable vehicle.
